summary: DHH announces completing his bachelor's degree in Computer Science and Business Administration at Copenhagen Business School, where he defended a thesis on Social Software. He reveals he's choosing not to pursue a free Master's degree, acknowledging this decision with self-aware arrogance. The brief post signals his eagerness to pursue other opportunities — likely Rails and 37signals work — over continued formal education.
key_points: Completed a B.Sc in Computer Science and Business Administration at Copenhagen Business School
Bachelor project focused on Social Software
Deliberately turning down a free Master's degree to pursue other opportunities
Self-aware about the arrogance of declining further free education
money_quotes: I realize this with a certain amount of arrogance for turning down a free Master's Degree, but still, there's just too many other opportunities right now that has my attention.
key_insight: DHH chose real-world opportunities over a free advanced degree, an early signal of his bias toward action and building over credentials.
